custom_css: .contractor-banner {top: 60px; position: fixed; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100vw; background-color: red; color: white; font-size: 2rem; letter-spacing: 0.6rem; padding: 1rem; margin: 0; z-index: 9999; text-align: center;}

settings.custom_liquid: Get Exclusive Access to our Contractor Pricing

settings.text:
Thank you for your interest in ProSwag Contractor Pricing. To Request access, fill out the form below. Once you submit your request, we'll respond within 1-2 business days with your access.

Your exclusive Contractor access provides you with a 25% discount on all ProSwag apparel, sitewide.

All personal information collected in this form will be used in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

By requesting a Contractor Pricing, you acknowledge and agree to ProSwag's Terms of Service.
